{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Fadac Resources and Services Limited -&nbsp;From recruitment to workforce strategy, we help you build teams that grow with your vision. Let&rsquo;s power your next phase of growth&mdash;through people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Asese-Ibafo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented Accountant to join our finance team at Mondo.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing day-to-day financial records, ensuring accurate bookkeeping, supporting financial reporting, and maintaining compliance with internal financial controls and regulatory standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, ledgers, and reports.
	Handle daily bookkeeping activities including postings, reconciliations, and journal entries.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes.
	Reconcile bank statements and resolve discrepancies in a timely manner.
	Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Support budget preparation and monitoring of expenditures.
	Ensure compliance with financial policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Assist with audits by providing necessary documentation and financial data.
	Work closely with other departments to ensure accurate financial tracking.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	2&ndash;3 years of relevant experience in accounting or finance roles.
	Strong knowledge of basic accounting principles and financial reporting.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Strong attention to detail and numerical accuracy.


Salary
N300,000 Net monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;clinton.o@fadacresources.com&nbsp;using &quot;ACCOUNTANT&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-09",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "name": "Fadac Resources and Services"
    
  },

Accountant Job at Fadac Resources and Services Limited




        
    

        
        Fadac Resources and Services Limited - From recruitment to workforce strategy, we help you build teams that grow with your vision. Let’s power your next phase of growth—through people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Asese-Ibafo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented Accountant to join our finance team at Mondo.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing day-to-day financial records, ensuring accurate bookkeeping, supporting financial reporting, and maintaining compliance with internal financial controls and regulatory standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, ledgers, and reports.
	Handle daily bookkeeping activities including postings, reconciliations, and journal entries.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes.
	Reconcile bank statements and resolve discrepancies in a timely manner.
	Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Support budget preparation and monitoring of expenditures.
	Ensure compliance with financial policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Assist with audits by providing necessary documentation and financial data.
	Work closely with other departments to ensure accurate financial tracking.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	2–3 years of relevant experience in accounting or finance roles.
	Strong knowledge of basic accounting principles and financial reporting.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Strong attention to detail and numerical accuracy.


Salary
N300,000 Net monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "ACCOUNTANT" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Project Affluence Limited - Our client, a leading oil &amp; gas/chemical firm, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: ICT Supervisor

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Industry:&nbsp;Oil and Gas/Chemical

Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with a minimum of 3 years&rsquo; experience in ICT support or administration.
	Experience in hardware/software support, networking, telecoms/VoIP/PBX, and Internet service management.
	Experience with CCTV, virtual meeting systems, website and email administration, and cybersecurity practices.
	Experience in graphic design and social media content creation.


Skills:


	IT Support/Help Desk
	Network &amp; System Admin
	Telecom Support
	Cybersecurity
	CCTV &amp; AV Tech.


Remunration
N350,000 to N400,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;talentfithr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

ICT Supervisor Job at Project Affluence Limited




        
    

        
        Project Affluence Limited - Our client, a leading oil & gas/chemical firm, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: ICT Supervisor

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Industry: Oil and Gas/Chemical

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with a minimum of 3 years’ experience in ICT support or administration.
	Experience in hardware/software support, networking, telecoms/VoIP/PBX, and Internet service management.
	Experience with CCTV, virtual meeting systems, website and email administration, and cybersecurity practices.
	Experience in graphic design and social media content creation.


Skills:


	IT Support/Help Desk
	Network & System Admin
	Telecom Support
	Cybersecurity
	CCTV & AV Tech.


Remunration
N350,000 to N400,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Spesa Superstore Operations Manager",
  "description": "Syx-Brij Nigeria Limited &nbsp;- Our client,&nbsp;Spesa Super Store is a fast-growing retail brand in Ikorodu, Lagos, offering quality groceries, household items, bakery products, and ready-to-eat meals.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Spesa Superstore Operations Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	As customer traffic continues to grow,we are looking for a competent, motivated, and experienced Store Manager / Supervisor to lead our supermarket team, oversee day-to-day operations, and deliver excellent customer service.


Key Responsibilities
As our Store Manager / Supervisor, you will:


	Oversee all supermarket operations, from opening to closing
	Lead, train, and supervise staff to maintain high performance
	Monitor stock levels, coordinate with inventory team, and ensure timely restocking
	Maintain a clean, organized, and visually appealing shopping environment
	Implement sales strategies and meet daily/weekly targets
	Handle customer escalations and ensure satisfaction
	Prepare daily/weekly reports for management
	Enforce company policies, health &amp; safety, and operational standards.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc. in Business Administration, Management, or related field
	2 &ndash; 3 years of proven experienceas a Store Manager, Supervisor, or Team Lead (supermarket or retail experience preferred)
	Strong leadership and people-management skills
	Excellent communication and organizational abilities
	Ability to work under pressure and solve problems quickly
	Must be honest, reliable, and committed to delivering great customer experiences
	Must be resident in Ikorodu or willing to relocate.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and staff welfare package
	Opportunity to grow with a fast-rising brand
	Supportive and dynamic work environment
	Performance-based incentives

Spesa Superstore Operations Manager Job at Syx-Brij Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Syx-Brij Nigeria Limited  - Our client, Spesa Super Store is a fast-growing retail brand in Ikorodu, Lagos, offering quality groceries, household items, bakery products, and ready-to-eat meals.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Spesa Superstore Operations Manager

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As customer traffic continues to grow,we are looking for a competent, motivated, and experienced Store Manager / Supervisor to lead our supermarket team, oversee day-to-day operations, and deliver excellent customer service.


Key Responsibilities
As our Store Manager / Supervisor, you will:


	Oversee all supermarket operations, from opening to closing
	Lead, train, and supervise staff to maintain high performance
	Monitor stock levels, coordinate with inventory team, and ensure timely restocking
	Maintain a clean, organized, and visually appealing shopping environment
	Implement sales strategies and meet daily/weekly targets
	Handle customer escalations and ensure satisfaction
	Prepare daily/weekly reports for management
	Enforce company policies, health & safety, and operational standards.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc. in Business Administration, Management, or related field
	2 – 3 years of proven experienceas a Store Manager, Supervisor, or Team Lead (supermarket or retail experience preferred)
	Strong leadership and people-management skills
	Excellent communication and organizational abilities
	Ability to work under pressure and solve problems quickly
	Must be honest, reliable, and committed to delivering great customer experiences
	Must be resident in Ikorodu or willing to relocate.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and staff welfare package
	Opportunity to grow with a fast-rising brand
	Supportive and dynamic work environment
	Performance-based incentives
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Security Officer",
  "description": "Hoop Telecoms Limited was established in 2017 as a full Telecommunications Service provider. Since its formation, Hoop Telecoms has been growing rapidly and is emerging as a leading provider of telecommunication and business solutions.&nbsp;Our goal is to be the telecom company of choice for voice, video, and data for consumers in Nigeria, West Africa, Africa, and globally. Simply put; our vision is global.

HOOPTEL is led by a strong management team with knowledge and extensive experience in the telecom industry, and other professionals with strong administrative skills and experience. We are primarily focused on delivering solutions to customers in Enterprise networks connectivity, Broadband internet services, Voice communication solutions, Video and secured data solutions, Data Centre and co-location services, managed cloud services, and other related telecommunication systems.&nbsp;We are a company driven to provide our customers with solutions that are customized to fit their current needs, yet flexible enough to accommodate their growth plans, at the most competitive pricing on all service offerings, thus optimizing IT spend and future proofing of our solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Security Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Security Officer is responsible for maintaining a safe and secure environment by patrolling the premises,and controlling access points. You will be the first line of defense against unauthorized entry, theft, and safety hazards.


Key Responsibilities


	Verify the identity of all employees, visitors, and contractors entering the facility. Manage visitor logs and issue temporary badges as required.
	Patrols: Conduct regular foot patrols of the perimeter, parking areas, and sensitive zones to ensure all entry points are locked and secure.
	Respond immediately to emergencies, including fire alarms, medical incidents, or security breaches, following established protocols.
	Maintain a detailed daily occurrence log. Promptly draft incident reports for any thefts, property damage, or safety violations.


Required Qualifications


	Education: Minimum of an Ordinary National Diploma (OND)or SSCE with 2 years of experience
	Proven experience as a Security Officer or in a similar protective role.
	Exceptional alertness, physical fitness, and the ability to remain calm under pressure.
	A clean criminal record and a high level of personal and professional ethics.
	Ability to communicate clearly and professionally with staff and visitors.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@hooptelecoms.com&nbsp;using &quot;Security Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Security Officer Job at Hoop Telecoms Limited




        
    

        
        Hoop Telecoms Limited was established in 2017 as a full Telecommunications Service provider. Since its formation, Hoop Telecoms has been growing rapidly and is emerging as a leading provider of telecommunication and business solutions. Our goal is to be the telecom company of choice for voice, video, and data for consumers in Nigeria, West Africa, Africa, and globally. Simply put; our vision is global.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



HOOPTEL is led by a strong management team with knowledge and extensive experience in the telecom industry, and other professionals with strong administrative skills and experience. We are primarily focused on delivering solutions to customers in Enterprise networks connectivity, Broadband internet services, Voice communication solutions, Video and secured data solutions, Data Centre and co-location services, managed cloud services, and other related telecommunication systems. We are a company driven to provide our customers with solutions that are customized to fit their current needs, yet flexible enough to accommodate their growth plans, at the most competitive pricing on all service offerings, thus optimizing IT spend and future proofing of our solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Security Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Security Officer is responsible for maintaining a safe and secure environment by patrolling the premises,and controlling access points. You will be the first line of defense against unauthorized entry, theft, and safety hazards.


Key Responsibilities


	Verify the identity of all employees, visitors, and contractors entering the facility. Manage visitor logs and issue temporary badges as required.
	Patrols: Conduct regular foot patrols of the perimeter, parking areas, and sensitive zones to ensure all entry points are locked and secure.
	Respond immediately to emergencies, including fire alarms, medical incidents, or security breaches, following established protocols.
	Maintain a detailed daily occurrence log. Promptly draft incident reports for any thefts, property damage, or safety violations.


Required Qualifications


	Education: Minimum of an Ordinary National Diploma (OND)or SSCE with 2 years of experience
	Proven experience as a Security Officer or in a similar protective role.
	Exceptional alertness, physical fitness, and the ability to remain calm under pressure.
	A clean criminal record and a high level of personal and professional ethics.
	Ability to communicate clearly and professionally with staff and visitors.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Security Officer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
